scope: Public benchmark data from cited third-party and editorial sources. These are not AERLUNE final product lab results.

records.use_case: Small bedroom / compact smart purifier benchmark
records.room_size: 22 m² recommended room size (also widely marketed with larger one-pass coverage figures)
records.filter: Pre-filter, particle filter, activated carbon, HEPASilent
records.note: Use as verified public benchmark for a compact smart model, not as AERLUNE final lab data.

records.model: Levoit Core 300S Smart True HEPA Air Purifier
records.use_case: Bedroom / pet-home / budget smart purifier benchmark
records.noise: Peak tested decibel reported at 58 dB in pet-air-purifier testing; another small-air-purifier test reports 48 dB on high
records.filter: Pre-filter + HEPA filter + activated carbon filter
records.source: The Spruce Pets / Better Homes & Gardens testing coverage
records.note: Use as verified public benchmark for a mid-size smart bedroom/pet model.

records.room_size: Up to 1,800 sq ft in one hour at 1 ACH; 900 sq ft in 30 minutes at 2 ACH
records.cadr: Smoke 240 CFM / Dust 242 CFM / Pollen 249 CFM
records.noise: 35 dB sleep mode; about 65–70 dB turbo in WIRED testing
records.smart: Auto mode and AQI display; no app cited in WIRED review
records.note: Use as verified public benchmark for high-CADR large-room positioning.

records.room_size: 41 m³ coverage cited in humidifier guide
records.cadr: Dyson models often do not use CADR as the primary rating in buyer guides; CADR not available in selected source
records.noise: Highest speed measured at 57.3 dB average in SELF review of Pure Humidify + Cool
records.filter: HEPA H13 / carbon filtration messaging cited in public reviews
records.smart: Remote/app/voice control cited in humidifier guide
records.dimensions: 36.3 H × 12.3 W; weight 18 lb cited in NYPost PH04 coverage
records.note: Use as verified public benchmark for purifier + humidifier feature positioning; not a direct AERLUNE spec.

records.room_size: A purifier CADR should be about two-thirds of the room area in square feet for room sizing guidance
records.cadr: Example: 300 sq ft room → around 200 CADR as a practical target
records.source: Health.com/BHG buyer guidance summarizing CADR rule
records.note: Use for SEO buyer education and room-size calculator logic.
